_comment: Celebrations for logging streaks (consecutive days with a purchase logged). {n} is the streak length in days. The app picks the highest tier whose 'minDays' the streak meets, then a line at random.

lines: Two days running. This is how it starts.
{n} in a row. Come back tomorrow and keep it alive.
{n}-day streak. Showing up is the skill, and you just showed up.
A full week, every day logged. That is a routine now.
{n} days without a gap. The ledger is lucky to have you.
A whole month of showing up. The habit belongs to you now.
{n} straight days. At this point the streak keeps you.
Thirty days of small entries and steady resolve. Remarkable.
{n} days. Triple digits. Legendary is the correct word.
One hundred days of showing up. Few ever get here, and you did.
{n}-day streak. Whatever you are guarding, it is well guarded.
